category_sources: source_facts.description says tools for producing ebook files; official GitHub README says these are Standard Ebooks tools for producing ebook files.
display_name_sources: source_facts.homepage points to standardebooks/tools; official README calls it the Standard Ebooks toolset.
docs_sources: Official GitHub README documents the se command and tool descriptions.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is empty; source_facts.homepage is the official GitHub repository for standardebooks/tools.
tags_sources: source_facts.description, source_facts.executables, and official README describe ebook production tools installed as the se CLI.
